narrative:
Huber Heights 4-B (precinct in Montgomery County) has 1,047 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a modest Republican lean of 2.2 percentage points.
